arts.ttl: Notts County v Cheltenham Town RECAP: Jordan Thomas and Ethon Archer spark superb fightback
arts.sum: Thomas hit the post in the final minutes after a wonderful piece of skill and County were also close to winning it through Will Jarvis' whose shot cannoned off the woodwork. Second-half goals from Jordan Thomas and Ethon Archer saw Cheltenham Town hit back from a goal down to defeat promotion-chasing Notts County 2-1 at Meadow Lane on Monday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Cheltenham hit back to snatch late win over Notts County
arts.sum: Goals from Jordan Thomas and Ethon Archer turned the game around.

arts.ttl: Former Exeter City, Notts County and Newport County AFC defender Scot Bennett triggers contract extension at Cheltenham Town
arts.sum: Scot Bennett's appearance for Cheltenham Town against Gillingham on Friday triggered an extension to his contract, boss Michael Flynn has confirmed. "We missed Scot for the five weeks he was out and he's had a really solid season," Flynn said.

arts.ttl: Deserving to win, Ryan Haynes impresses and a new contract triggered - Cheltenham Town boss Michael Flynn after Gillingham draw - Gloucestershire Live
arts.sum: Then the Crewe game we were very good and today we backed it up a little bit. You could say a good point, but after that first-half display, we were the team who looked most likely to go on and get a winner.

arts.ttl: Preview: Notts County vs. Cheltenham Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League Two clash between Notts County and Cheltenham Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
